title: T-042 — D365 DLQ list / replay / resolve / payload routes (08-PROD-e, §8.2.7)
prompt:
# T-042 — D365 DLQ list / replay / resolve / payload routes

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.2.7, §5.5 (DLQ retention), §3.2 RBAC (Prod Manager / Admin)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Expose admin REST routes consuming `d365_push_dlq` (T-010) for the DLQ admin UI (T-051). Provide list with filters + health stats, replay (re-enqueue to outbox), mark-resolved (with required resolution notes, audit-preserving), and read-only payload retrieval for inspection.

## Implementation contract
1. `GET /api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq` — query params: `status` (open|resolved|all), `since`, `wo_id`, `page`, `page_size`. Returns rows + aggregate stats (`open_count`, `oldest_age_min`, `success_rate_24h`).
2. `POST /api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/[id]/replay` — re-inserts into `production_outbox_events` with `attempt_count` reset and writes an audit row; original DLQ row keeps `status='REPLAYED'` and gains `replayed_by_user_id` + `replayed_at`.
3. `POST /api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/[id]/resolve` — body `{ resolution_note: string min(10), resolution_kind }`; sets `status='RESOLVED_NO_PUSH'`, records `resolved_by_user_id` + `resolved_at` + note; never deletes the row.
4. `GET /api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/[id]/payload` — returns raw canonical + mapped JSON; read-only.
5. All routes guarded with Prod Manager OR Admin role from 02-SETTINGS §14 RBAC; every mutation writes an `audit_log` row (actor, action, before/after status, correlation_id).

## Files
- apps/web/app/api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/[id]/replay/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/[id]/resolve/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/[id]/payload/route.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/d365-dlq.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/__tests__/d365-dlq.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given two DLQ rows (one OPEN, one RESOLVED_NO_PUSH), when GET list with `status=open` is called by a Prod Manager, then only the OPEN row plus aggregate stats with non-null `oldest_age_min` are returned.
2. Given a DLQ row in OPEN state, when POST replay is invoked by an Admin, then a new `production_outbox_events` row is created, the DLQ row transitions to `REPLAYED` with `replayed_by_user_id`/`replayed_at`, and an audit_log row records the action.
3. Given POST resolve is invoked without `resolution_note` or with note shorter than 10 chars, when the route handler runs, then it returns 422 with a validation error and no DLQ row is mutated.

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/api-services/production/__tests__/d365-dlq.test.ts asserting list filter + stats, replay audit trail, resolve note-required, and payload read-only before service exists.
- Run `pnpm vitest run packages/api-services/production/__tests__/d365-dlq.test.ts`
- Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not delete DLQ rows on resolve (audit retention until resolved per §5.5).
- Do not allow replay/resolve without Prod Manager/Admin role.
- Do not return raw D365 credentials or signed envelope in payload route.
- Do not let resolve bypass the `resolution_note` min(10) zod constraint.

pipeline_inputs.description: Admin REST routes for D365 DLQ list/replay/resolve/payload with RBAC and audit logging; resolution never deletes DLQ rows.
pipeline_inputs.details: Four routes wrap a single d365-dlq service. List supports status/wo_id/since/pagination and embeds aggregate stats (open_count, oldest_age_min, success_rate_24h). Replay re-enqueues into production_outbox_events and writes audit_log + transitions the DLQ row to REPLAYED. Resolve requires resolution_note min(10) (zod) and sets status='RESOLVED_NO_PUSH' without deleting the row. Payload route is read-only (no mutation). Every mutation passes through Prod Manager/Admin RBAC guard from 02-SETTINGS §14 and writes audit_log.
out_of_scope: Do not implement the dispatcher or adapter (T-041)
Do not implement the DLQ admin UI (T-051)
acceptance_criteria: Given two DLQ rows (OPEN/RESOLVED_NO_PUSH), when GET list with status=open is called by Prod Manager, then only the OPEN row plus aggregate stats with non-null oldest_age_min are returned.

Given a DLQ row in OPEN, when POST replay is invoked by Admin, then a new production_outbox_events row is created, DLQ row transitions to REPLAYED with replayed_by/at and an audit_log row records the action.
Given POST resolve without resolution_note or with note <10 chars, when handler runs, then it returns 422 validation error and no DLQ row is mutated.
test_strategy: RED: packages/api-services/production/__tests__/d365-dlq.test.ts asserting list filter+stats, replay audit, resolve note-required and payload read-only before service exists.
risk_red_lines: Do not delete DLQ rows on resolve.
Do not allow replay/resolve without Prod Manager/Admin role.
Do not return raw D365 credentials in payload route.
Do not bypass resolution_note min(10) constraint.
